narrative:
Bellevue City 2-A (precinct in Sandusky County) has 347 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a clear Republican lean of 10.1 percentage points.
